arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's centre-back options including under-21s amid worsening injury crisis
arts.sum: Though he’s never done it for Boro until switching midway through the Derby game, Borges has played centre-back before in his career. Neto Borges played centre-back at Swansea, with Ryan Giles coming on at left-back.

arts.ttl: ‘More at stake for them’ – Middlesbrough vs QPR prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Middlesbrough vs QPR prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Tuesday. The post ‘More at stake for them’ – Middlesbrough vs QPR prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Millwall's Josh Coburn summer transfer stance confirmed as Middlesbrough loanee scores again
arts.sum: Alex Neil has confirmed Millwall want to sign Josh Coburn from Middlesbrough in the summer, after the striker scoring their winner against Watford on Saturday. He scored two goals in the last two games that he started, or played in.
